  • Package
  • Use

  • Index
  • Search
  • Help
  1. recoder.java

Uses of Package
recoder.java

Packages that use recoder.java
Package
Description
de.uka.ilkd.key.java
This package contains classes that cover the Java programming language.
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.recoderext
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.recoderext.adt
This package contains RecodeR Operators which represent algebraic data type functions.
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.recoderext.expression.literal
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.logic
provides a representation for the term structure.
de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op
contains the operators of JTerms.
de.uka.ilkd.key.parser
This package contains the parser for .key and .proof files.
de.uka.ilkd.key.parser.proofjava
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.parser.schemajava
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.util.removegenerics
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.util.rifl
RIFL is short for "Requirements for Information Flow Language", a tool-indepentent specification language developed in the RS3 project.
recoder
This package contains some basic definitions.
recoder.convenience
The convenience layer contains auxiliary functions that are useful in the context of RECODER.
recoder.io
The io package provides classes to import and export source and class files.
recoder.java
This package contains classes that cover the Java programming language.
recoder.java.declaration
Elements of the Java syntax tree representing declarations.
recoder.java.declaration.modifier
This package collects all Java modifiers.
recoder.java.expression
Elements of the Java syntax tree representing expressions.
recoder.java.expression.literal
This package contains representations for the various Java literal types.
recoder.java.expression.operator
Elements of the Java syntax tree representing operators and operator-like expressions.
recoder.java.reference
Elements of the Java syntax tree representing implicit or explicit (named) references to other program elements.
recoder.java.statement
Elements of the Java syntax tree representing pure statements.
recoder.kit
This package contains the RECODER transformation framework.
recoder.kit.transformation
This package contains transformation command objects and associated problem reports.
recoder.kit.transformation.java5to4
Contains transformations which attempt to make a java5 project compilable with -source 1.4 compiler switch and which can be used by a java 1.4 runtime environment.
recoder.list.generic
The (new) list system for recoder.
recoder.parser
This package contains the JavaCC generated parser.
recoder.service
This package contains the semantical services of RECODER.
  • Classes in recoder.java used by de.uka.ilkd.key.java
    Class
    Description
    Comment
    A comment, possibly with multiple lines.
    CompilationUnit
    A node representing a single source file containing TypeDeclarations and an optional PackageSpecificationand an optional set of Imports.
    Identifier
    Identifier.
    Import
    Import.
    JavaProgramElement
    Top level implementation of a Java ProgramElement.
    NonTerminalProgramElement
    Non terminal program element.
    PackageSpecification
    Package specification.
    ProgramElement
    A part of the program syntax that carries semantics in the model.
    SourceElement.Position
    The position of a source element, given by its line and column number.
    StatementBlock
    Statement block.

    Top level implementation of a Java SourceElement.

    Loop initializer.
    NamedProgramElement
    Named program element.
    NonTerminalProgramElement
    Non terminal program element.
    ParameterContainer
    Describes program elements that contain ParameterDeclarations.
    PrettyPrinter
    A configurable pretty printer for Java source elements.
    ProgramElement
    A part of the program syntax that carries semantics in the model.
    Reference
    References are uses of names, variables or members.
    ScopeDefiningElement
    The property of a non terminal program element to define a scope.
    SourceElement
    A source element is a piece of syntax.
    SourceVisitor
    A source visitor defines actions to be triggered while visiting source elements.
    Statement
    Statement.
    StatementBlock
    Statement block.
    StatementContainer
    Statement container.
    TerminalProgramElement
    Terminal program element.
    TypeScope
    The property of a non terminal program element to define a scope for types.
    VariableScope
    The property of a non terminal program element to define a scope for variables.
